entities.description: A single financial settlement event originating from the core ledger, carrying debit/credit amounts, currency, counterparty references, and settlement date.
A confirmation message from the payments gateway indicating the execution status of an outgoing or incoming payment instruction.
The output of the matching engine linking a Settlement Transaction to a Payment Confirmation, with match type, confidence score, and analyst override flag.
An immutable log entry recording every reconciliation action for regulatory compliance and operational traceability.
